prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Wire pulling (feeders & branch), part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming (planning item). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification). Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Wire pulling (feeders & branch) (industrial site)
